decisions.decision: Persist UI review despite auditor write restriction.

next_action: Ask the user for the next action; recommended next step is /gsd-secure-phase 03 before milestone archive, or fix 03-UI-REVIEW.md findings first.
context_notes: Phase 3 and the v1.0 UI refactor milestone are implemented, verified, marked complete, UI-reviewed, and browser_harness smoke-tested. browser_harness passed for mobile /, /sessions, /members, /login, /create-session guard, and desktop /sessions + /members with no visible errors or global overflow. UI review score remains 17/24 with priority findings in typography normalization, safe-area calc syntax, and exact CTA/copy alignment. Security gate remains pending before archive because workflow.security_enforcement is true and no 03-SECURITY.md exists.
